name: contentforge
description: Developer content pipeline — draft, adapt, schedule, and publish to DEV.to, Mastodon, Bluesky, Twitter, LinkedIn from your AI assistant.
author: Mehdi Baneshi <baneshi@gmail.com>

tools.name: draft_content
tools.description: Create a new content draft with title, body, tags, and project.

tools.name: list_content
tools.description: List content items in the pipeline, optionally filtered by status (idea, drafting, ready, published).

tools.name: show_content
tools.description: Show full details of a content item including adaptations and publications.

tools.name: adapt_content
tools.description: Adapt content for a specific platform (devto, mastodon, bluesky, twitter, linkedin).

tools.name: publish_content
tools.description: Publish adapted content to a platform.

tools.name: schedule_content
tools.description: Schedule content for publication at a specific future time.

tools.name: pipeline_status
tools.description: Show current pipeline status: content counts by stage, configured platforms, recent publications.
